name: daily-spend-report
_phase_4_note: Phase 4 OBS-03. Fires once per day at 12:00 UTC (08:00 ET during EDT, 07:00 ET during EST). The body of the message is yesterday's spend, so the 1-hour wobble between EST/EDT is fine. Activated as part of Step B operator activation (see docs/PHASE_4_OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md). Until activated, the Day 5 verifier flips green via a manual run of scripts.observer.daily_spend_report.

nodes.name: Run daily_spend_report
nodes._comment: Calls the Railway HTTP worker route added in scripts/perception_worker.py. The worker itself sends the Telegram message + writes the audit row; this workflow only triggers the worker. No fan-out node needed.
